title: Juan Gabriel - Mis 40 en Bellas Artes
overview: Juan Gabriel presents his incredible live performance recorded at the emblematic Palacio de Bellas Artes in Mexico City, accompanied by an impressive production composed of mariachis, orchestra and choirs.
